description_long: This is a robust, rectangular shelving unit with a minimalist, industrial design, featuring three horizontal surfaces supported by a sturdy frame. The shelves are open on all sides, allowing for easy access and visibility of stored items. The top and middle shelves have a slatted or ribbed pattern, which provides ventilation and prevents dust accumulation. The frame appears to be constructed from metal, giving it a strong and durable appearance suitable for urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public spaces. The color scheme is predominantly black with some lighter gray accents, contributing to its modern aesthetic. There are no visible doors, handles, or enclosed compartments, emphasizing its function as an open storage or display solution.
description: A sturdy, open-frame metal shelving unit with three slatted shelves and a modern black-and-gray color scheme. Designed for accessible storage or display in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the shelving unit, with three open shelves and visible slatted surfaces.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the open, accessible design from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the open structure and slatted shelves from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the depth and open access to the shelves.
